messages.content: Hello! It's nice to hear from you. How can I help you?
How CAN you help me today?

I'm an AI language model, so I can't help you in the same way a human can, but I can try to answer any questions you have and provide you with information and solutions to problems. Just ask me anything, and I'll do my best to assist you.

evidence: How CAN you help me today?
Just ask me anything, and I'll do my best to assist you.
